zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Ridware於1262年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾派 利德瓦雷時，他的父親Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware18歲，母親Elena FitzHerbert17歲。他與Margaret de Vere在美國維吉尼亞州斯特費爾德斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1327年在英國斯塔福爾哈姆斯塔爾 利德瓦雷享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Ridware于1262年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾派 利德瓦雷时，他的父亲Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware18岁，母亲Elena FitzHerbert17岁。他与Margaret de Vere在美国弗吉尼亚州斯特費爾德斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1327年在英国斯塔福爾哈姆斯塔爾 利德瓦雷享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Ridware was born in 1262, in Pipe Ridware, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware, was 18 and his mother, Elena FitzHerbert, was 17. He married Margaret de Vere in Staffordshire, Chesterfield, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1327, in Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Ridware est né en 1262, à Pipe Ridware, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Elena FitzHerbert, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Vere à Staffordshire, Chesterfield, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1327, à Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Ridware 1262 in Pipe Ridware, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware 18 und seine Mutter Elena FitzHerbert 17. Er hat in Staffordshire, Chesterfield, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Margaret de Vere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1327 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Ridware è nato il nel 1262 nel Pipe Ridware, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Elena FitzHerbert, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Vere nel Staffordshire, Chesterfield, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1327, nel Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Hampsetd Ridware,Staffordshire,England: イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Ridwareが1262年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアピペ リドワーで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridwareは18歳，母Elena FitzHerbertは17歳であった。アメリカ合衆国バージニア州チェステルフィールドスタフォードシュアイアでMargaret de Vereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1327年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアハムスタル リドワーで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Ridware(이)가 1262년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 파이프 리드워에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Elena FitzHerbert(은)는 17세였다. 그는 미국 버지니아 주 체스터필드 스태퍼드실르에서 Margaret de Vere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1327년 영국 스태퍼드실르 함스탤 리드워에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Ridware nasceu em 1262, em Pipe Ridware, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Elena FitzHerbert, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Vere em Staffordshire, Chesterfield, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1327, em Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Ridware родился в 1262 г. в местности паип ридвар, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Elena FitzHerbert, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Vere в местности стаффордшир, честирфиелд, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1327 г. в местности хамсталл ридвар, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Margaret de Vere en Staffordshire, Chesterfield, Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1327, en Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
